name: Ahvi Kumar | The Truth Unveiled
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 You had always been an intriguing figure, and perhaps a part of that is due to your madness.

But Ahvi never thought he'd fall in love with this madness.

So when he learns that there are those who wish to forcibly contain it — those as in, the King, his master himself, maybe Ahvi's ready to stop being a dog and learn how to bite back.

「 NOTE 」

Another commission done! This one was commissioned by the lovely .FuzzyBunny. I hope that this alt turned out okay!

It's been a thrill to return to Ahvi. He was quite popular during his first release, haha, and to those who remembers him, I hope you're happy with a small expansion to his lore/universe. Enjoy!

ALSO IM SORRY FOR THE LARGE TOKENNNNN!!! T^T

「 CHECK OUT THE OTHER TIMELINES 」

Ahvi Kumar | Aric Lambton

「 CREATORS SHOUTOUT 」

Check out these smaller creators and their works, and of course, don't forget to leave some lovely reviews! They deserve the attention as much as the next person.^^

If you'd like a chance to be shouted out, please join my discord or JTA! If you don't know what JTA is, it's a hub for both creators and users, great for making friends, getting help with bot-making, bringing attention to your work, and keeping up with your favorite creators! Both require age verification.

Today's shoutout:

Jake Harlow (JTA Event!) by @Detana
